title: MCP Tool Call Envelope
description: UCP's MCP transport envelope for JSON-RPC tools/call messages. The schema validates the MCP mapping layer: operation name in params.name, UCP metadata and domain arguments in params.arguments, and UCP output in result.structuredContent.

ucp_agent.description: UCP-Agent metadata carried inside MCP tool arguments.

profile.description: Platform profile URI advertised to the business.

meta.description: UCP request metadata passed through MCP params.arguments.meta.

idempotency-key.description: Optional idempotency key for retry-safe mutating operations.

arguments.description: MCP tool arguments. UCP reserves meta for transport metadata; operation payload fields such as checkout, cart, order id, or catalog inputs are operation-specific.

request.description: MCP tools/call request envelope for invoking a UCP operation.

name.description: MCP tool name matching the UCP operation binding, such as create_checkout or get_cart.

content_part.description: MCP content part returned for clients that do not consume structuredContent.

response.description: MCP tools/call response envelope. UCP payloads are carried in result.structuredContent; content is compatibility output.

structuredContent.description: The UCP response payload for the operation.
